rulings.Case Title: QI REN LI ET AL VS. IDAMAE LEWIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendants Jenny Ying He And Century 21 Realty Alliance, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Issues
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 11, 2018 line 1. DEFENDANTs JENNY HE and CENTURY 21 REALTY ALLIANCE, INC.'s Motion For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Issues DENIED, untimely under Code of Civil Procedure section 437c(a)(3). = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SUSANNE FORS VS. SF REALTY PARTNERS LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Sf Realty Partners, Llc; Growth Equity Partners, Llc And Ashok Gujral'S Demurrer To Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 11, 2018 line 2. Defendants Sf Realty Partners, Llc; Growth Equity Partners, Llc And Ashok Gujral'S Demurrer To Second Amended Complaint OVERRULED in part and SUSTAINED in part. The demurrer to the First Cause of Action is OVERRULED. The demurrer to the Second Cause of Action is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to address waiver. The demurrers to the Third, Fourth and Fifth Causes of Action are SUSTAINED with leave to amend to plead facts with sufficient specificity to sustain those claims. (See Committee on Children's Television, Inc. General Foods Corp. (1983) 35 Cal.3d 197, 216.) The court, however, is not satisfied that the moving party complied with the meet and confer requirements of Code of Civil Procedure section 430.41(a). = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SUSANNE FORS VS. SF REALTY PARTNERS LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 11, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT GROWTH EQUITY PARTNERS LLC, ASHOK GUJRAL, SF REALTY PARTNERS LLC DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Off Calendar. Duplicate entry.= (501/CFH)
